summary:
The most probable cause of an apical radiolucent area post-RCM at this stage involves incomplete sealant placement, often related to inadequate filling material reaching critical areas such as major or minor canals. This highlights the necessity for precise technique during endodontic procedures especially concerning complete closure of anatomically complex structures near roots' tips. \boxed{Incomplete Seal}
